module.name: no-await-in-loop
module.description: Disallow await expressions inside loops; use Promise.all() for parallel execution.

scenarios.name: should allow await at the top level of an async function
scenarios.given: an await expression that is not inside any loop

scenarios.name: should allow Promise.all() inside a loop
scenarios.given: a for..of loop that awaits Promise.all()

scenarios.name: should report an await expression inside a for loop
scenarios.given: an await expression nested inside a for() loop body

scenarios.name: should report an await expression inside a for..of loop
scenarios.given: an await expression nested inside a for..of loop body

scenarios.name: should report an await expression inside a while loop
scenarios.given: an await expression nested inside a while loop body
